commit_scope: Promote the speech teacher lane from file-only macOS TTS/STT receipts into a live speaker-to-room loop with Mac mic STT and Android mic co-witness telemetry.

commands: coord claim live-dual-mic-speech-loop "Promote speech teacher from file TTS receipt to live speaker->Mac mic plus Android mic witness receipt; no new toy stack."
scripts/live_speech_loop_receipt.sh "form native speech loop listens with two microphones"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/speech-model-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/speech-live-loop-band.fk
bash -n scripts/live_speech_loop_receipt.sh && cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh speech-live-loop
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide first reported a sibling continuity blocker in /Users/ursmuff/source/Coherence-Network on branch claude/metal-m4-silicon-proven. User said continue; the documented temporary bypass PROMPT_GATE_SKIP_CONTINUITY=1 was used and start-gate passed in linked worktree mode. Wellness passed with unrelated witness-trace latency attention. Live Android/Mac witness was already present at http://127.0.0.1:8800/state with Android mic active. The live loop played known text through the Mac speaker, recorded the room through the Mac microphone, transcribed the Mac mic WAV with local whisper-cli ggml-large-v3-turbo, and sampled the Android witness mic lane during the same window. Receipt passed: transcript_overlap_percent=100, mac_mic_samples=81600, duration_ms=5100, mac_mic_rms_ppm=10544, android_mic_samples=28, android_mic_min_rms_ppm=1151, android_mic_max_rms_ppm=9354, android_mic_avg_rms_ppm=1720. The Mac witness was restarted from this worktree and /state exposes speech_loop.status=pass, overlap=100, mac_mic_samples=81600, android_mic_samples=28. The in-app browser dashboard showed SPEECH LOOP pass · 100% with Mac and Android mic metrics. Form validation returned 255 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent. The manifest gate returned PASS-4WAY speech-live-loop.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy in this slice. The local Mac speaker/mic, local Whisper model, and live Android witness were used as the physical proof surface.

phase_gate.gate: Known text must be played through a real speaker, heard by the Mac mic, transcribed locally, and co-witnessed by Android mic telemetry before becoming live speech training data.
phase_gate.next: Add Android raw PCM upload or Android-side STT so both mics can produce transcript/error receipts, not only Mac transcript plus Android RMS co-witness telemetry.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The speech teacher lane now has a repeatable live acoustic training loop: text to TTS speaker playback, Mac mic STT transcript/error receipt, Android mic co-witness metrics, and Form-native four-way acceptance as a live dual-mic speech sample.
test_flows: Render known text with macOS say.
Play the audio through the Mac speaker while recording the Mac microphone.
Poll the Android witness mic lane during the same window.
Transcribe the Mac microphone recording with local whisper-cli and compare to expected text.
Hash retained audio/transcript artifacts and write a live speech loop receipt.
Lower the receipt through Form and prove the live dual-mic sample four-way.
e2e_validation.summary: Local end-to-end live speech loop passed with real speaker playback, Mac mic recording, local Whisper transcript, and Android mic co-witness telemetry.
